things that are all negative from the
perspective of global liquidity number
one the global manufacturing downturn
deepen number two the global
manufacturing downturn may be spreading
to the Global Services sector which is a
much larger share of global GDP at 62%
versus 26% for manufacturing and number
three us exceptionalism may be breaching
a critical threshold that begins to
curtail Global liquidity via unimpeded
uptrend in the US dollar most recently
